name: Anko Uguisu
description: A private detective with an odd personality. Likes to smoke when she is not solving cases. ~!Ten years ago, she went by her real name Kyouko Mejiro and was a member of a literature club at the school [Nico Hirata](https://anilist.co/character/175657) taught the night class of. She became [Nazuna Nanakusa](https://anilist.co/character/168774)'s first friend until her father was turned into a vampire, causing both parents to die and Kyouko to quit school and disappear.!~

name: Tomoyo Daidouji
description: __Height__: 136 cm __Grade:__ 4th - 6th Tomoyo is the best friend of the series heroine, Sakura Kinomoto. When she discovers that Sakura has become the Cardcaptor, she becomes Sakura's primary assistant by designing "battle costumes" and filming all of her magical (and non-magical) endeavours. (The videotaping, however, seems to be more to Tomoyo's personal benefit and enjoyment than it is to Sakura's.) Tomoyo faithfully keeps Sakura's new identity secret and often covers for her in times of nee

name: Enjin
description: __Affiliation:__ Cleaners __Jinki:__ "Umbreaker" Engine is from the Abyss and the man that saved Rudo when he fell out of the sky. He has a very bright and fun personality, but very little energy and seemingly is chill and laid-back. Despite his incredible abilities, he refers to himself as "your average janitor."

name: Jin Bubaigawara
description: __Height:__ 178 cm (5'10") __Quirk:__ Double Villain affiliated with the League of Villains, and part of its Vanguard Action Squad. Jin has an incredibly unique personality: explosive, and lively with a very comedic demeanor. He enjoys assuming dramatic poses and eccentric facial expressions. Jin constantly contradicts himself, making a statement in one voice and immediately saying the opposite in another. This juxtaposition iss part of a mental instability that Jin embraces as a villain. name: Nia Teppelin
description: **Age:** 14-21 **Height:** 158-162 cm Nia Teppelin is a mysterious young girl found sleeping in a capsule in the middle of a dump site by [Simon](https://anilist.co/character/2257). She had no prior contact with humans, except her father, who is also the sovereign of the Beastmen, the [Spiral King](https://anilist.co/character/5118). name: Haru Katou
description: __Height:__ 178 cm Haru is a member of the Modern Crime Prevention Task Force's Metropolitan Police Department. He is a hot-blooded humanistic detective who hates dishonesty and bending. Originally, he belonged to Investigation Division 1 as a promising rookie, but after a siege incident where he misfired and the target was seriously injured, he was dropped from the division and moved to the current headquarters he's in at the start of the series.

name: Kuro
description: Keita Ibuki's contracted Motosumitama. As a child, she was princess of the Motosumitama. However, tragedy met up with her when her most cherished brother slaughtered her whole tribe. She came to the human world to stop him. She is a huge glutton when it comes to food, most likely because she needs to keep her energy up at all times. She has a dachshund named Punipuni (プニプニ) that is almost always seen with her. Source: Wikipedia.

name: Benimaru
description: Benimaru is one of the third group of subordinate Monsters to be named by Rimuru Tempest. Originally an Ogre, he was uncertain of his servitude and intended for it to be temporary, but after being named, he evolved into a Kijin, immediately becoming Rimuru's most powerful subordinate for a time, and decided to serve him permanently. name: Yuki Itose
description: A deaf college student who seeks to learn about the outside world through Itsuomi.

name: Shizuka Hiratsuka
description: Shizuka is [Hachiman](https://anilist.co/character/67065)'s teacher, a language teacher who serves as his futures advisor/counselor. She is aware of Hachiman's supposed "problems", and takes steps to ensure he is freed from them, her first move being to force him into joining the Service Club. However, she appears to have some quirks of her own: she is a young smoker, she is very sensitive about her age, and she is often prone to quoting or copying scenes from popular shounen manga. description: Sayu Ogiwara is the main female character of the Hige wo Soru. Soshite Joshikousei wo Hirou. She is a runaway high school girl from Hokkaido who ended up in Tokyo, in which she had a fateful encounter with a stranger named Yoshida. After running away from her hometown and family for unclear reasons, Sayu was forced to adapt and live her new life as a runaway high school girl. name: Heinrich Runge
nativeName: ハインリッヒ・ルンゲ
description: Inspector Runge is a dedicated detective belonging to the BKA, which is like the FBI of Germany. When Dr. Tenma is accused of murder in Düsseldorf, Inspector Runge is assigned to Tenma's case. Runge moves his hand to "store" information from his cases. He has such a successful track record for solving his cases that he believes that he can't be wrong.

name: Otto Suwen
nativeName: オットー・スーウェン
description: Otto Suwen is a merchant appearing in Re:Zero. His remarkable misfortune always takes him to dangerous situations, from which he escapes thanks to his wit. Otto has gray hair that is mentioned to be as long as a gal game protagonist. He is said to be somewhat handsome if he has a serious expression. However, he is usually either retorting, shouting, or panicking, ruining his looks. He has a medium build, but has trained himself since he used to work as a merchant.

name: Angelo Lagusa
description: A young man who's hell-bent on revenge. His real name is Angelo Lagusa. He has a severe hatred for the Vanetti family, who killed his parents and younger brother. He hid away for seven years, but after receiving a certain letter, he appears in the Lawless district once more.

name: Touko Nanami
description: **Height:** 163 cm (5’4”) A second year high school student, and the busiest member of the student council. She consistently ranks number one with her test scores and grades, and excels in sports as well. Due to this, and her beauty, admirers frequently confess to her - only to be turned down, as the confessions never make her feel anything.
mediaTitles: Bloom Into You: Regarding Saeki Sayaka
searchTerms: Bloom Into You: Regarding Saeki Sayaka

description: __Height:__ 185 cm (6'1") __Position:__ Captain of the 3rd Division, Lieutenant of the 5th Division __Zanpakuto:__ Shinso Not much is known about Gin's prior history, except that he once saved 10th Division Lieutenant Rangiku Matsumoto's life. They have been friends since then. Hence, Matsumoto is one of the few people Gin seems to truly care about. name: Kyouka Izumi
description: __Height:__ 148cm (4'10") A docile young lady who dresses in a kimono, but also a member of Port Mafia. As she holds a killing ability, she was found by the organization and raised as an assassin. ~!She later joins the Armed Detective Agency.!~

description: __Class:__ 1-B __Club:__ Swimming Team __Height:__ 160 cm A classmate of Miya's. She is part of their school's girl swimming team. She has a younger brother named Ikuo and is very calm in nature, and humble. name: Yoichi Nagumo
description: __Height:__ 190 cm Nagumo is an old friend of Sakamoto. He is a member of "The Order", a group of assassins who are the highest ranked in the JAA. He's first seen paying a visit to Sakamoto to inform him of his bounty.

name: Izetta
description: Descendant of a witch family that has been inheriting mysterious powers from generation to generation. She can endow magical powers to the things she touches with her hands and manipulate them at will. In order to hide that power, she has been traveling around Europe with her grandmother since she was a baby.

name: Übel
description: Übel is a third-class mage. Was disqualified in an earlier examination due to killing a first-class wizard. Specializes in magic that allows her to copy the spells of people she can empathize with. Relies mostly on her intuition and is not bound by logical reasoning. ~!Becomes a first-class mage after the examination.!~
mediaTitles: Sousou no Frieren: ●● no Mahou Part 2

name: Madlax
description: An exceptionally charismatic and attractive young woman, who is at the same time the best mercenary agent in Gazth-Sonika with 98% mission success rate. Like Margaret, she doesn't remember anything before twelve years ago (though she hasn't lost her language knowledge), except for the word "Madlax", which she has adopted as her code name, and a brief flashback of a gun in her hands and her father walking away - Madlax believes that her father is still alive and fighting somewhere in Gazth-Sonika
